title: ENOMEM open user spec file
rationale: ENOMEM is a user-environment errno (out of memory opening file); added to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS.
fixSummary: Add ENOMEM to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS in resolveErrorCode.
problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOMEM while opening user spec file surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.
